nasb.text: When he came to the king, the king said to him, “Micaiah, shall we go to Ramoth-gilead to battle, or shall I refrain?” He said, “Go up and succeed, for they will be given into your hand.”

esv.text: And when he had come to the king, the king said to him, “Micaiah, shall we go to Ramoth-gilead to battle, or shall I refrain?” And he answered, “Go up and triumph; they will be given into your hand.”

cnv.text: 米該雅來到王那裡，王問他：“米該雅啊，我們可以到基列的拉末作戰嗎？還是不要去呢？”他回答：“可以上去，一定得勝，他們必交在你們手裡。”

ccb.text: 米该雅来到王面前，王就问他：“米该雅啊，我们可不可以去攻打基列的拉末？”米该雅回答说：“上去攻打吧，一定得胜，敌人必被交在你们手中。”
